inputs.label: Wall Length
inputs.businessContext: Total horizontal length of the wall in meters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total horizontal length of the wall in meters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Duvarın metre cinsinden toplam yatay uzunluğu.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte horizontale Länge der Wand in Metern.

inputs.label: Wall Height
inputs.businessContext: Vertical height of the wall from floor to ceiling in meters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Vertical height of the wall from floor to ceiling in meters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Duvarın zeminden tavana metre cinsinden dikey yüksekliği.
businessContext_i18n.de: Vertikale Höhe der Wand vom Boden bis zur Decke in Metern.

inputs.label: Block Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of a single block including any interlocking features in millimeters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Length of a single block including any interlocking features in millimeters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kilitleme özellikleri dahil tek bir bloğun milimetre cinsinden uzunluğu.
businessContext_i18n.de: Länge eines einzelnen Blocks einschließlich etwaiger Verriegelungsmerkmale in Millimetern.

inputs.label: Block Height
inputs.businessContext: Height of a single block in millimeters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Height of a single block in millimeters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tek bir bloğun milimetre cinsinden yüksekliği.
businessContext_i18n.de: Höhe eines einzelnen Blocks in Millimetern.

inputs.label: Mortar Joint Thickness
inputs.businessContext: Thickness of the mortar joint between blocks in millimeters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Thickness of the mortar joint between blocks in millimeters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bloklar arasındaki harç derzinin milimetre cinsinden kalınlığı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Dicke der Mörtelfuge zwischen den Blöcken in Millimetern.

inputs.label: Price per Block
inputs.businessContext: Unit price of one block in USD.

businessContext_i18n.en: Unit price of one block in USD.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir bloğun USD cinsinden birim fiyatı.

inputs.label: Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of extra blocks to account for cutting, breakage, and waste.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of extra blocks to account for cutting, breakage, and waste.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kesim, kırılma ve fireyi hesaba katmak için ek blok yüzdesi.
